figmaNodesCompared.description: Desktop header with About submenu open

revisionsVerified: Container wrapper: VERIFIED - .container class present in all header blocks
Submenu text white: VERIFIED - text-white class used throughout
Logo spans full height: VERIFIED - self-stretch + **:h-full on logo link
Search form with input: VERIFIED - <form> with <input> + <button> submit
SEP arrow in PHP: VERIFIED - ExternalArrow.svg in both desktop and mobile SEP links
Mobile toggle renders: VERIFIED - hamburger button with aria-controls in all blocks

passedChecks.description: Container wrapper is present. Header.php wraps $children in <div class='container'>. Page audit confirms .container found in all 7 header blocks. Container uses --max-container = min(100% - 2*gutter, --breakpoint-xl). Header no longer spans full viewport width.

Desktop two-row layout matches Figma. Top utility row: search (250px, border-b) + vertical separator + SEP link with arrow. Bottom row: nav items with chevrons, right-aligned. Logo on left spanning full nav bar height.
Nav bar background: bg-charcoal (#1f1f1d) vs Figma #1e1e1c. 1-unit RGB difference, imperceptible and within tolerance.
Nav bar rounded corners: rounded-[25px]. Matches Figma exactly.
Nav bar padding: px-8 (32px) py-4 (16px). Figma: px-32 py-16. Exact match.
Nav items: font-sans font-medium text-base (16px) leading-[1.16] uppercase text-white. Matches Figma General_Sans:Medium 16px.

Search is now a <form> with role='search', <button type='submit'> with SearchIcon.svg, and <input type='search'>. Width 250px, border-b border-white, pb-1 (4px). Figma: pb-4. Exact match. Revision VERIFIED.
SEP link renders with ExternalArrow.svg on desktop. gap-2 (8px) between text and icon. Figma: gap-8. Exact match. Revision VERIFIED.
Gap between utility row and nav row: gap-6 (24px). Figma: gap-24. Exact match.
Gap between nav items: gap-8 (32px). Figma: gap-32. Exact match.
Vertical separator between search and SEP: w-px h-5 bg-white. Matches Figma.
Active/expanded nav item: aria-expanded:text-neon-green (#d4ff45). Matches Figma's About expanded state.
Submenu dropdown: bg-charcoal, rounded-xl (12px), p-6 (24px). Figma: bg-charcoal, rounded-12, p-24. Exact match.
Submenu items gap: md:gap-4 (16px). Figma: gap-16. Submenu item padding: py-2 (8px). Figma: py-8. Exact match.
Submenu text is white (text-white). Previously black on black background. Now matches Figma. Revision VERIFIED.
Logo link uses self-stretch with **:h-full, spanning full nav bar height. Figma logo height: 57.685px. Implementation correctly fills available height. Revision VERIFIED.
SEP mobile button above nav bar: bg-charcoal, rounded-full, p-4 (16px), gap-3, text-white uppercase + ExternalArrow.svg. Figma: rounded-119px, p-16. Matches.
Gap between SEP button and nav bar: gap-2 (8px). Figma: gap-8. Exact match.
Mobile toggle button renders with MainMenuOpen.svg / MainMenuClose.svg. aria-controls and aria-expanded attributes present. Revision VERIFIED.
Mobile expanded nav structure: logo + close X, divider (hr), nav items (vertical gap-8=32px), search, CTA text + Contact Us button. Matches Figma structure.
Mobile sub-items indentation: pl-6 (24px). Figma: pl-24. Gap between sub-items: gap-1 (4px). Figma: gap-4. Exact match.

Mobile CTA: text in font-sans font-medium text-base leading-[1.5]. Contact Us button: bg-white text-charcoal rounded-full p-4 uppercase. Gap-4 (16px). Figma: gap-16, bg-white, charcoal text, rounded-119px, p-16. Matches.
Mobile search: border-b border-white pb-2 (8px), search icon + input. Figma: pb-8. Exact match.
Tablet (768px) correctly shows mobile layout with SEP button above nav bar. Mobile toggle visible.
Laptop (1024px) shows desktop layout. Nav items may wrap at this width due to many items, which is expected responsive behavior since Figma only designs for 1376px.

issues.element: Logo image is favicon instead of full logo with wordmark
issues.figmaValue: Logo: bee icon (66.84px) + IGNITE wordmark (148.6px), total ~215px wide, 57.685px tall
issues.implementationValue: Test page uses favicon.png (small bee icon only, no wordmark)
issues.difference: Test content issue - wrong image uploaded, not a code issue
issues.recommendation: Upload the full Ignite logo SVG (bee + IGNITE wordmark) to the test page. Block code is correct - it uses self-stretch + **:h-full and handles any uploaded logo. This is purely a test content asset issue.

issues.figmaValue: All 6 nav items in single row (Figma designed at 1376px)
issues.implementationValue: At 1024px with container constraint, nav items may wrap due to narrower available width
issues.difference: Expected responsive behavior - flex-wrap handles gracefully
issues.recommendation: No change needed. The Figma only shows the 1376px desktop state. flex-wrap behavior at narrower widths is correct and graceful.

issues.figmaValue: Figma uses Roboto:Medium for SEP link, submenu items, CTA text. General_Sans:Medium for nav items.
issues.implementationValue: Implementation uses font-sans (General Sans) for all text elements
issues.recommendation: Theme intentionally maps all text to General Sans. No change needed unless client requires Roboto.

revisionVerification.description: RE-RUN after developer fix cycle. All 6 key changes verified.

changes.evidence: Header.php wraps $children in <div class='container'>. Page audit confirms .container in all 7 header blocks. Container: --max-container = min(100% - 2*gutter, --breakpoint-xl).
HeaderMainSubItem.php: text-white. HeaderMainItem.php submenu: text-white. Confirmed in code.

changes.change: Logo now spans full header height
changes.evidence: Logo <a>: self-stretch w-auto **:w-auto **:max-w-full **:h-full shrink-0. Logo image fills full nav bar height.

changes.change: Search is now a form with input field + submit button with icon
changes.evidence: Desktop: <form role='search'> with <button type='submit'> SearchIcon.svg + <input type='search'>. Mobile: same pattern. Page audit: 2 search forms per block.

changes.change: SEP arrow now shows in PHP
changes.evidence: HeaderMain.php line 105: ExternalArrow.svg in desktop SEP link. Line 38: ExternalArrow.svg in mobile SEP button.
Button with md:hidden, aria-controls, aria-expanded. MainMenuOpen.svg / MainMenuClose.svg. Page audit: mobileToggle found in all 6 header-main blocks.

accessibilityFeatures: aria-expanded on menu toggle and submenu buttons
aria-controls linking toggle to collapsible nav
aria-label on nav element, logo link, and search submit buttons
role=search on both desktop and mobile search forms

questionsForUser.question: The test page uses favicon.png as the logo, which only shows the bee icon without the IGNITE wordmark. Should the full logo SVG be uploaded for a more accurate visual comparison?
questionsForUser.recommendation: Upload the full Ignite logo SVG to the test page. Block code correctly handles any logo.
